title: Notification No.28/2000-Cus(NT), dated 27.4.2000
text: TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY PART-II, SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (i), DATED THE 27th APRIL.2000) 7 VAISAKHA 1922 SAKA GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF FINANCE ( DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE) New Delhi, the, the 27th April.2000 7Vaisakha 1922 Saka NOTIFICATION N0.28/2000-CUSTOMS( N.T ) G.S.R. (E) - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Government hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs,(ICD), Tughlakabad, New Delhi to be the Commissioner of Customs (Import), New Custom House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai for the purpose of adjudicating the Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s. Rajesh Enterprises and M/s. Surya Enterprises, 607, Ratan Joyti Building, Rajender Place, New Delhi issued vide DRl.F-No.50D/60/97-CI., dated the 3rd March, 2000 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi. F.N0.437/6/2000-CUS.IV (RAJENDRA SINGH) UNDER SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA Back -- 1 of 1 --
